prompt: A lavish dark fantasy anime illustration of 11 elegant young women gathered in a grand gothic library at night, composed like an elite magical academy coven portrait. The room is filled wall-to-wall with towering wooden bookshelves, rolling ladders, crimson velvet banners with occult gold sigils, carved paneling, candlelight, a warm table lamp on the far left, red upholstered armchairs and sofas, stacked antique books, potion bottles, crystal orbs, brass instruments, and a tall arched window showing a deep violet night sky. The overall palette is black, crimson, gold, and purple, with dramatic low-key lighting, rich shadows, glossy highlights, and a luxurious, sinister atmosphere. All 11 characters wear coordinated occult-school uniforms: black tailored jackets with gold embroidery and crest details, white shirts, red ties or ribbons, layered belts and chains, short skirts or fitted bottoms, black thigh-high stockings, and black capes lined in dark red. Place 3 seated prominently in the middle on ornate red chairs and sofa, 3 in the back row standing among the shelves, 3 in the front row on the floor or leaning close to the table, and 2 reclining at the far left and far right edges. Vary their hair colors and styles across the group, including blonde, silver, black, red, blue, brown, and purple; use long wavy hair, twin tails, straight long hair, side ponytail, and loose layered cuts. Give each woman a calm, confident, slightly dangerous expression, as if they are genius witches or aristocratic students. Count and include 6 clearly visible magical effects or props being actively handled: 1 red flame floating above a raised hand in the back center, 1 glowing purple orb held by a standing girl near the upper right center, 1 swirling purple magic circle over an open book at the lower left, 1 faint purple arcane flame near the lap of the seated silver-haired girl on the right-center, 1 dark violet smoky aura around the far-right reclined girl, and 1 glowing purple crystal lamp or alchemical vessel on the central coffee table. Also include 4 additional glass vessels in the foreground and side tables: 1 crystal ball at the bottom left, 1 tall red potion bottle at the bottom right, and 2 smaller laboratory bottles beside it. Add multiple open and closed grimoires across laps, tables, and the floor, with at least 8 visible books in total. The central focal character is a poised blonde girl seated in the largest armchair, legs crossed, hand near her face, framed as the leader. Render in highly detailed polished anime style, ultra-detailed fabrics, intricate gold trim, subtle facial shading, luminous eyes, cinematic composition, wide group shot, fantasy key art quality, moody gothic academia, magical sisterhood, sharp focus, ornate environment, no modern objects.
